# Sitework

> Sitework (sitework.build) is a productized web design and local SEO agency built exclusively for trades contractors and home service businesses in the United States — HVAC, plumbing, electrical, roofing, construction, and home services. Founded by Carter, based in Austin, Texas, working nationwide.

## What Sitework does

- Custom website design for trades contractors: mobile-first, fast-loading, hand-built static pages engineered to convert local searches into service calls
- Local SEO: dedicated service pages, on-page optimization, local citations, rank tracking
- Google Business Profile optimization and management: categories, services, photos, weekly posts, map pack positioning
- Reputation management: review generation strategy, response management, trust building
- Growth strategy and consulting for trades businesses

## How it works

Sitework builds a free working demo website for a contractor before any payment or sales conversation. Pricing is flat monthly subscription plans plus a one-time setup fee, including hosting, maintenance, content updates, and ongoing local SEO management. Sites launch in days, not months.

## Pages

- [Home](https://sitework.build/): Overview of services and approach
- [Why Sitework](https://sitework.build/why-sitework): Founder story — ten-plus years working with thousands of trades contractors
- [HVAC Website Design](https://sitework.build/hvac-website-design): Websites for heating and cooling companies
- [Plumber Website Design](https://sitework.build/plumber-website-design): Websites for plumbing companies
- [Electrician Website Design](https://sitework.build/electrician-website-design): Websites for electrical contractors
- [Roofing Website Design](https://sitework.build/roofing-website-design): Websites for roofing companies
- [Construction Website Design](https://sitework.build/construction-website-design): Websites for general contractors, builders, and remodelers
- [Home Services Website Design](https://sitework.build/home-services-website-design): Websites for garage door, pest control, landscaping, and other home service businesses
- [Pricing](https://sitework.build/pricing): Current plans and setup fees
- [Resources](https://sitework.build/resources): Free guides and strategy for contractors
- [How HVAC Companies Get More Customers in 2026](https://sitework.build/how-hvac-companies-get-more-customers): Complete customer-acquisition playbook for HVAC owners — map pack, reviews, website conversion, seasonality, paid leads
- [Why Good Contractors Lose Jobs to Bad Ones](https://sitework.build/why-good-contractors-lose-jobs): The visibility gap — being found, being trusted, being first — and how to close it
